query_intent: Segment customers by follow-on store revenue after they bought Women/maternity items via catalog or web in May 1998, using revenue bands of size 50.

dag_nodes.intent: Collect distinct customers who purchased Women/maternity items via catalog or web in May 1998 and carry their current address keys.
For those customers, sum store-sales extended price in the next three month sequences where customer county/state matches store county/state.
Convert each customer revenue into an integer segment bucket by dividing by 50.
Count customers per revenue segment and report segment id with segment base amount.
